qas.q: The definition of Targeted Violence includes which of these components? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Any form of violence

For a specific reason

Directed at an individual or group

qas.q: Which of the following are true about Insider Threats? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
The threat than an insider will access information without a need to know

Threat can include unauthorized disclosure of national security information or thought the loss or degradation of department resources or capabilities

Threat can include damage thought espionage or terrorism

Any person with authorized access to DoD resources by virtue of employment, volunteer activities, or contractual relationship with DoD

(select all 4 answers)

qas.q: The transfer of classified or proprietary information to a system not approved for the classification level or unaccredited or unauthorized systems, individuals, applications, or media is a _____.
qas.a: Spill

qas.q: A member of your team openly discusses her financial difficulties and her inability to meet her financial obligations. What is the appropriate action?
qas.a: Report the concerning behavior to your security officer

qas.q: Insiders may include which of these groups of people? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Employees

Contractors

Active duty military

Former employees

(select all 4 answers)

qas.q: Which of the following is a reportable behavioral indicator?
qas.a: Significant change in work habit

qas.q: To whom should you report if you are contacted by a member of the media about information you are not authorized to share?
qas.a: Your security office

qas.q: Which of the following are things that adversaries want to know? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Your organization's personnel

Countries your organization works with

Your company's competitors

qas.q: Which of the following means to deliberately destroy, damage, or obstruct, especially for political or military advantage?
qas.a: Sabotage

qas.q: Most inside offenders display concerning behaviors before acting directly against their organization. This behavior may include (select all that apply):
qas.a:
Violations of workplace policies

Failure to follow standard procedures (SOP)

Legal difficulties

qas.q: If you are contacted by a member of the media about information you are not authorized to share, you should take down which of the following details? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Their name and their organization name

How they contacted you

Date and time of contact

qas.q: Who might be interested in non-public information that an insider can provide? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Terrorist organizations

Non-state actors

Foreign governments

Competitors

(select all 4 answers)

qas.q: Where can elicitation techniques be used? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
In person

In email

Over the phone

In written communications

(select all 4 answers)

qas.q: Technological advances _____. Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Increase risk of information loss

Allow insiders to access more data

qas.q: Which of the following is a technology-related indicator? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Improper use of privileged access

Bypassing technology-associated protocols

Hoarding files and data

qas.q: You observe a colleague with a sudden increased alcohol intake (e.g., frequent heavy consumption, drinking until drunk) what is the appropriate action?
qas.a: Report the concerning behavior to your security officer

qas.q: _____ is a conversation technique used to discreetly gather information that is not readily available and do so without raising suspicion.
qas.a: Elicitation

qas.q: Which of the following statements is true about technology and the insider threat?
qas.a: Technology changes the scale of risk from insider threats

qas.q: Sharing details of your personal and professional lives or life online makes you _____ adversaries.
qas.a: More vulnerable to

qas.q: You can help reduce technology-associated insider threats by:
qas.a: Enlisting countermeasures

qas.q: Contractors must report which of these? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Any event ...

Any event that may impact an individual's personnel security clearance

Anything that affects the proper safeguarding of classified information

Any indication that classified information has been lost or compromised

(select all 4 answers)

qas.q: A coworker shares that she and her husband are facing foreclosure, and she doesn't know what to do. What should you do? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Suggest she contact the EAP

Report the indicator to your security office

qas.q: U.S. Government employees and contractors must report which of the following? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Personal foreign travel

Speeches or books including information about involvement with the Intelligence Community

Foreign contacts

qas.q: Which of these may be targeted by foreign entities? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Personnel lists

Classified information

Unclassified information

List of facility locations

(select all 4 answers)

qas.q: Technological advanced impact the insider threat by _____. Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Allowing large amounts of data to be accessed

Presenting new security challenges

qas.q: A coworker keeps requesting information access to a project to which they are not assigned. What should you do?
qas.a: Report the incident to your Security Office

qas.q: Hostile entities may use social media to _____? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Build a profile of a person

Quickly recruit someone of spying

Search for classified information

Gather information on personnel

(select all 4 answers)

qas.q: Which of the following countermeasures can help reduce technology-associated insider threats? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Inventory your technology holdings

Watch for behavioral indicators

qas.q: Which of the following are behavioral indicators that must be reported?
qas.a:
Excessive debt

Disregard for security procedures and protocols

qas.q: The acronym EAP stands for _____?
qas.a: Employee Assistance Program

qas.q: Which of the following must be reported to the Defense Counterintelligence and Security Agency and the FBI? Select all that apply.
qas.a:
Actual, probably, or possible espionage

Actual, probably, or possible terrorism

Actual, probably, or possible sabotage

Actual, probably, or possible subversive activities

(select all 4 answers)
